title: Bridge Essay: Kundalini Yoga for Post-Treatment Lyme Disease: A Preliminary Randomized Study.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Heat/Fire** (Phase 3) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Heat/Fire to mechanistic neuroscience through Kundalini, Yoga, for, Post-Treatment, Lyme.

**Kundalini Yoga for Post-Treatment Lyme Disease: A Preliminary Randomized Study.** — Healthcare (Basel). PMID: 35885840. DOI: 10.3390/healthcare10071314. This study examined the adherence to and the potential benefit of Kundalini yoga (KY) for post-treatment Lyme disease syndrome (PTLDS). Participants were randomly assigned to 8 weeks of a KY small-group intervention or awaitlist control (WLC). Adherence was measured as attendance at KY group sessions. Primary outcomes assessed pain, pain interference, fatigue, and global health. Secondary outcomes assessed multisystem symptom burden, mood, sleep, physical and social functioning, cognition, and
